text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho's goal is to find her racing magic
and become a grand witch like her grandma.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sheer talent for running is so overwhelming
that seeing her race is akin to seeing magic in
motion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she can be a little bratty. She always treats
me like her "familiar," and proves herself a
handful the moment our first training session
begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my journey as an overworked familiar for
a demanding magical girl on a quest to win the
Twinkle Series has officially begun!
